commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor or human follow-up is needed because automation cannot supply the external after-fix app proof for this PR.; Cleared: The diff only touches Swift app menu lifecycle code and tests; I found no concrete security or supply-chain concern. (sha=c39cb661fadc5e398ec77f295f3db348ddbb8428)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds deferred closed-menu rebuild tracking and cancellation, keeps stale nonempty menu contents visible while refreshes are in flight, and adds focused status-menu tests.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a clear source-level path: current main leaves closed attached menus stale after invalidation and repopulates stale menus synchronously on open. I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or human follow-up is needed because automation cannot supply the external after-fix app proof for this PR.

target.title: Defer closed menu rebuilds during refresh
target.body:
## Summary
Prepare attached closed menus after refresh work settles, and keep stale nonempty menu content on open while store or token refreshes are active.

## Validation
- `swift test --filter 'StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests|StatusMenuPersistentRefreshTests|StatusItemControllerShutdownTests'`
- `make check`
- `git diff --check`

## Runtime Proof
Pushed cleanup fix at `c39cb661`.

Focused menu-refresh proof run:

```text
$ swift test --filter StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests
Test "closed attached menu is prepared before next open after invalidation" passed
Test "closed attached menu preparation waits for store refresh to finish" passed
Test "closed attached menu preparation waits for token refresh to finish" passed
Test "closed menu rebuild cleanup runs when weak menu disappears" passed
Test "menu open keeps stale nonempty content while store refresh is active" passed
Test "menu open keeps stale nonempty content while token refresh is active" passed
Test run with 25 tests in 1 suite passed
```

Also ran `git diff --check` after the cleanup patch; it passed with no output. Private local paths and provider-state log noise were omitted from this transcript.
target.author: prospectore
